scripts.desktop:dev: npm run desktop:build:web && node scripts/desktop-dev-profile.mjs alice
scripts.desktop:dev:alice: npm run desktop:build:web && node scripts/desktop-dev-profile.mjs alice
scripts.desktop:dev:bob: npm run desktop:build:web && node scripts/desktop-dev-profile.mjs bob
scripts.desktop:pack:dir: npm run desktop:build:web && npm run desktop:rebuild:native && node ./electron/prepare-pack.mjs dir && electron-builder --config ./electron-builder.yml --dir --publish never
scripts.desktop:pack:mac: npm run desktop:build:web && npm run desktop:rebuild:native && node ./electron/prepare-pack.mjs mac && electron-builder --config ./electron-builder.yml --mac --publish never
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test --test-timeout=120000 --test-force-exit test/shell.startShellServer.test.js test/index.wsUrl.integration.test.js test/auth.flow.test.js test/auth.unlock.offline.test.js test/auth.selectAccount.intent.test.js test/no-legacy-app-imports.test.js test/no-unregistered-stores.test.js test/guardrails.mac-entitlements.test.js test/labels.contactDisplayName.regression.test.js test/thread.labels.test.js test/thread.presentation.test.js test/thread.summary-and-send.contracts.test.js test/records/ChatThread.test.js test/records/ChatStoreMessage.test.js test/records/ChatContact.test.js test/records/ChatRuntimeConfig.test.js test/records/AccountRegistryData.test.js test/records/ChatInvite.test.js test/desktop.auth-services.test.js test/desktop.vault.test.js test/desktop.vault.recovery.test.js test/desktop.supervisor.test.js test/desktop.ipc.test.js test/desktop.runtime-client.test.js test/desktop.dev-profile.test.js test/desktop.bus-bridge.test.js test/desktop.two-user-events.integration.test.js test/desktop.two-user-mutations.integration.test.js test/desktop.two-user-ui.integration.test.js test/architecture.no-ipc-facade.test.js test/server.thread-storage.test.js test/messages.mutations.test.js test/server.invites.accept.test.js test/server.invites.offline-inviter.e2e.test.js test/server.member-join.test.js test/server.group-message-authz.test.js test/server.peerlink.protocol.handshake.test.js test/server.peerlink.reject-teardown.test.js test/server.group-fanout.test.js test/server.group-creator.test.js test/server.group-ops-propagation.test.js test/websocket-uplink.integration.test.js test/architecture.final-cleanup.test.js && node --test --test-timeout=120000 test/sdk.portability.test.js
